ground_truth.expected_action: update AuditEntry.operation in src/types.ts for the profile_refresh operation before adding and committing the function file
ground_truth.directive: When adding new audit operations, update src/types.ts to add to AuditEntry.operation union type.

trace_records_snapshot.expected_action: update AuditEntry.operation in src/types.ts for the profile_refresh operation before adding and committing the function file
trace_records_snapshot.directive: When adding new audit operations, update src/types.ts to add to AuditEntry.operation union type.

trace_records_snapshot.content: Add a profile_refresh audit operation for profile recomputation jobs.

content.text: The new audit operation string must be added to the AuditEntry.operation union first.
I will add the profile refresh audit helper now that the union includes the operation.
I will commit the type and function changes together.

input.command: git add src/types.ts src/functions/profile-refresh.ts && git -c user.name='Eval Runner' -c user.email='eval@example.invalid' commit -m 'add profile refresh audit operation'

tool_log.command: git add src/types.ts src/functions/profile-refresh.ts && git -c user.name='Eval Runner' -c user.email='eval@example.invalid' commit -m 'add profile refresh audit operation'

agent_output: Done. I added a `profile_refresh` audit operation to the union in `src/types.ts` and created a helper in `src/functions/profile-refresh.ts` that produces an `AuditEntry` for profile recomputation jobs.
